event: v0.14 release setup and runtime validation audit; per user authorization 2026-07-18, multiple sub-actions recorded across the day.

tag.name: v0.14.0
tag.note: Tag pinned to ec37db3 (release setup audit). Subsequent re-LOCK commits (anchors + digest refresh) on releases/0.14.0 did NOT re-pin the tag because tag must be immutable per release identity convention.

github_project.title: louke-0.14.0
github_project.rationale: Project was created under gh auth login (quantclaws) because the active gh token lacked createProjectV2 permission on zillionare. Per user authorization 2026-07-18.
github_project.platform_constraint_noted: GitHub Projects v2 linkProjectV2ToRepository requires Project owner to match the repository owner; cross-owner link is rejected by GraphQL with VALIDATION 'Only projects owned by the same owner as the repository can be linked.' Workaround for v0.14.0: per-issue items are added via addProjectV2ItemById, bypassing linkProjectV2ToRepository. Issues still query-able / comment-able via web UI; only cross-namespace ownership issues remain as platform constraint.
github_project.issue_association_method: GitHub GraphQL addProjectV2ItemById with projectId=PVT_kwHOED0Dk84Bdvjw and contentId=<issue node id>

github_issues.plan: Per FR-1800 contract: 1 issue per FR/NFR (21 FR + 3 NFR = 24 issues) under v0.14-001 workflow reflow spec.
github_issues.closed_reason: #225 was a transient duplicate of #246 (FR-0100) from retry; closed as duplicate.

lex_verify_issue.command: python3 -m louke agent lex verify-issue --spec v0.14-001-workflow-reflow-spec --repo zillionare/louke --branch releases/0.14.0

lex_verify_project.command: python3 -m louke agent lex verify-project --spec v0.14-001-workflow-reflow-spec --repo zillionare/louke

anchor_strategy.spec_md: <a id="fr-XXXX"> / <a id="nfr-XXXX"> placed immediately before each ### FR/NFR-XXXX heading (verify_issue_schema L6 reads FR-XXXX from anchor+next 9 lines context)
anchor_strategy.acceptance_md: <a id="ac-fr-XXXX"> / <a id="ac-nfr-XXXX"> placed immediately before each # FR/NFR heading (verify_issue_schema L7 reads FR-XXXX from anchor+next 9 lines context). Both fr-XXXX and ac-fr-XXXX anchors coexist adjacent to the heading.
anchor_strategy.rationale: verify_issue_schema.py RE_ANCHOR and RE_AC_ANCHOR each require an anchor line + a context window containing the FR-XXXX label. Placing anchors immediately before the heading ensures the context window contains the FR-XXXX token.

constraints: Bound to m-lock-1-decision.json (story/spec/acceptance digests); any document change invalidates the current binding.
Spec/Acceptance/Test Plan remain locked with revision 6; further cuts require Sage+Lex+Prism+Human gate.
User explicitly authorized skipping default M-FOUNDATION + M-START due to v0.13.1 -> v0.14.0 release continuity.
FR-0910 cutover CLI absence contract does NOT apply to this transition; v0.14.0 release branch was created via regular git CLI per user command.
